query:
-- Show vehicle count per user
SELECT u.id, u.username, COUNT(v.id) as vehicle_count 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON u.id = v.userId 
GROUP BY u.id, u.username 
ORDER BY vehicle_count DESC;

-- Show all vehicles with their user info
SELECT v.id, v.plateNumber, v.brand, v.model, u.username 
FROM vehicles v 
JOIN users u ON v.userId = u.id 
ORDER BY u.username, v.plateNumber;
